chapter.subject: mathematics
chapter.title: Triangles
syllabusOutline: Basic Proportionality Theorem study and proof
chapter.studySummary:
## Syllabus outline
- Basic Proportionality Theorem study and proof
- Similarity Criteria: AAA, SSS, SAS
- Pythagoras theorem proof and derivations

Pedagogical concepts and learning benchmarks for Class 10 active curriculum.

videos.title: Triangles Geometry Class 10 Maths Chapter 6 One Shot
milestones: Basic Proportionality Theorem study and proof

transcripts.text: BPT states if a parallel line is drawn to one side of triangle, it cuts other sides in equal ratio. Write down construction steps carefully!
Similarity is different from congruence. Similar triangles have equal angles and proportional sides.
In boards, they ask you to prove BPT. 5 marks guaranteed. Do not lose this!

scholarTips: For BPT proof, draw perpendiculars from upper vertices to opposite sides. Calculate areas of upper triangle using different bases. Take ratios. It is so easy!
Remember! Similar triangles area ratio is equal to square of their corresponding side ratios. Extremely useful in 2-mark questions.
chapter.disclaimer: AI-generated study guide (VOLTAIC). Not official CBSE/NCERT. Verify facts with your textbook and teacher.
